channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Deep pothole, 16th June
item.description:
Outside of 2 to 18 Dowty Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Dowty Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Collapsed manhole cover, 16th June
item.description:
Just by speed bump on Lechmere Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Grevil Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mess Russell street no 20.(again), 16th June
item.description:
Not for first time massive mess outside of that property…this time cardboard and different rubbish on pavement Russell street outside no 20 Can you please send some to talk to people leaving in that property they need to understand they can’t leave rubbish outside on pavement as pavement is not part of there’s rented property. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Russell Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Please add a keep clear or double yellow lines in this turning space., 16th June
item.description:
Cul de Sac end of Pembridge Close, Charlton Kings

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Pembridge Close, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown nettles blocking back access to property, 16th June
item.description:
Over grown nettles and weeds have blocked the acess to no20 and no21 Laxton road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of old wood dumped in gulley outside entrance to Cheltenham Animal Shelter, 16th June
item.description:
Flytipping - tow lots in the gulley and a third pile just by the Midwinter allotment entrance.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gardners Lane, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 16th June
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 16th June
item.description:
Road closure lane closure 28 day carriage way pothole approx 1000x300x50mm (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised drain cover outside 6 Arle Gardens, 16th June
item.description:
Outside 6 Arle Gardens is a storm drain that sits higher than the surrounding road surface. Therefore, when it rains the water cannot go into the drain and water remains around it for a long time after the rain has stopped as it has nowhere to go.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocking Slab outside 41 Arle Gardens, 16th June
item.description:
The pavement slab outside 41 Arle Gardens is has a big crack through it and one half rocks quite badly if stepped on.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Arle Gardens, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
